title: As gas prices soar, Europe faces threat of an energy shock
subhed: The war in the Middle East risks triggering a global battle for gas, sending European prices skyrocketing in recent days. Several liquefied natural gas tankers have rerouted to deliver their cargoes to Asia.
byline: By Marie de Vergès and Virginie Malingre (Brussels, Europe bureau)

title: Netanyahu vows to carry on war, 'eradicate Iranian regime'
subhed: Israeli leader Benjamin Netanyahu said that thanks to the bombing campaign by Israeli and American pilots, 'We have gained almost complete control of the airspace' over Iran's capital. Speaking to the Iranian people, he said the 'moment of truth' was coming as Israel was seeking to help liberate them from the 'yoke of tyranny.'

title: New attacks in Gulf as Iran vows for more
subhed: Loud explosions were heard in Dubai, the Qatari capital Doha and Bahrain's Manama, with attacks reported in the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar and Kuwait.

title: Cultural heritage under threat from Middle East war
subhed: Several sites, including Tehran's Golestan Palace and Tel Aviv's Bauhaus buildings, have sustained damaged from missile strikes.

title: War in Iran: The uncertain aftermath of US and Israeli military dominance
subhed: One week after the launch of Operation Epic Fury, Israel and the United States can claim numerous successes, with no major losses. However, they still have not set a clear objective, as the situation in the region grows increasingly chaotic.

Iranian school hit by air strike: Le Monde's investigation confirms many civilian victims, including children
subhed: Videos obtained and analyzed by Le Monde confirmed that the bombing of a school in Minab, Iran, on the first day of joint US-Israeli strikes on the country, caused many civilian victims, including children.

title: Azerbaijan and Armenia, both neighbors of Iran, fear regional spillover of conflict
subhed: Two Iranian drones struck Azerbaijan's Nakhchivan region on Thursday, raising fears of an expansion of hostilities in the South Caucasus, as Baku maintains close ties with Israel.

title: War in Iran puts political pressure on both isolationist Vance and interventionist Rubio
subhed: Neither the US vice president nor the secretary of state stands to gain from a show of military force that lacks a clear strategy and runs counter to the MAGA doctrine. The conflict is primarily Donald Trump's, who appears unconcerned about his political legacy.
